subcodes.first_line: As to what hath been mentioned concerning differences among the beloved ones: in all the divine Tablets they have been enjoined unto love and unity, fellowship and concord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اینکه در اختلافات بین احباب ذکر شده بود جمیع در الواح الهیه بمحبت و اتحاد و مودت و وداد
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @consultation, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity
